events.text: Marcos Rojo (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  France 1, Argentina 0. Antoine Griezmann (France) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Nicolás Tagliafico (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  France 1, Argentina 1. Ángel Di María (Argentina) left footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Éver Banega.
Javier Mascherano (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  France 1, Argentina 2. Gabriel Mercado (Argentina) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Lionel Messi   following a set piece situation.
Éver Banega (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  France 2, Argentina 2. Benjamin Pavard (France) right footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Lucas Hernández with a cross.
Goal!  France 3, Argentina 2. Kylian Mbappé (France) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the centre of the goal.
Goal!  France 4, Argentina 2. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Olivier Giroud with a through ball.
Blaise Matuidi (France) is shown the yellow card.
Benjamin Pavard (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  France 4, Argentina 3. Sergio Agüero (Argentina) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Lionel Messi.
Nicolás Otamendi (Argentina) is shown the yellow card.
Olivier Giroud (France) is shown the yellow card.
